Input Device Functions

The following input device functions are used:

  • XGetDeviceChanges
  • XGetDeviceEnumerationStatus
  • XGetDevices
  • XInitDevices
  • XInputClose
  • XInputDebugGetKeystroke
  • XInputDebugInitKeyboardQueue
  • XInputGetCapabilities
  • XInputGetDeviceDescription
  • XInputGetState
  • XInputOpen
  • XInputPoll
  • XInputSetLightgunCalibration
  • XInputSetState
